new_value: Fixed duplicate tx_start debug_log emission in start_transmission when jitter disabled; now only _do_start_transmission emits the detailed diagnostic. Updated test now passes with expected single log containing node_state=TX and context fields. Ruff/mypy clean; full debug+logging tests pass.
